orange-cap.title: Orange cap — most runs
orange-cap.description: Top run-scorers across all captured MLC matches. The MLC equivalent of the IPL Orange Cap.
orange-cap.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

purple-cap.title: Purple cap — most wickets
purple-cap.description: Top wicket-takers across all captured MLC matches.
purple-cap.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

strike-rate.title: Highest batting strike rates
strike-rate.description: Best batting strike rates with a minimum sample floor.

economy-leaders.title: Best bowling economy rates
economy-leaders.description: Lowest bowling economy rates with a minimum sample floor.

most-sixes.title: Most sixes
most-sixes.description: Top six-hitters across captured MLC matches.
most-sixes.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

most-fours.title: Most fours
most-fours.description: Top boundary-hitters across captured MLC matches.
most-fours.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

top-knocks.title: Highest individual scores
top-knocks.description: Highest individual innings scores across captured MLC matches.
top-knocks.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

best-bowling.title: Best bowling — wicket leaders
best-bowling.description: Wicket totals across captured MLC matches. Per-innings figures available on player profiles.
best-bowling.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

most-ducks.title: Most ducks
most-ducks.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

single-digit-outs.title: Most single-digit outs
single-digit-outs.description: Most times dismissed for fewer than 10 runs.
single-digit-outs.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor; all qualifying appearances included.

powerplay-strike-rate.title: Highest powerplay strike rates
powerplay-strike-rate.description: Best batting strike rates in the powerplay (overs 1–6 of a T20 innings).

death-overs-economy.title: Best death-overs economy
death-overs-economy.description: Lowest bowling economy rates in death overs (overs 17–20 of a T20 innings).
death-overs-economy.floorNote: Minimum 15 legal deliveries bowled in overs 17–20.

death-overs-strike-rate.title: Highest death-overs strike rates
death-overs-strike-rate.description: Best batting strike rates in death overs (overs 17–20).

powerplay-economy.title: Best powerplay economy
powerplay-economy.description: Lowest bowling economy rates in the powerplay (overs 1–6).
powerplay-economy.floorNote: Minimum 18 legal deliveries bowled in overs 1–6.

batting-average.title: Best batting averages
batting-average.description: Highest batting averages across captured MLC matches (runs per dismissal).

bowling-average.title: Best bowling averages
bowling-average.description: Lowest bowling averages across captured MLC matches (runs per wicket).

bowling-strike-rate.title: Best bowling strike rates
bowling-strike-rate.description: Fewest balls per wicket (lower is better) across captured MLC matches.

most-runs-conceded.title: Most runs conceded
most-runs-conceded.description: Bowlers who conceded the most runs — high-volume context metric.
most-runs-conceded.floorNote: Counting stat — no minimum sample floor.

pp-runs.title: Most powerplay runs scored
pp-runs.description: Top run-scorers in the powerplay (overs 1–6) across captured MLC matches.

death-runs.title: Most death-overs runs scored
death-runs.description: Top run-scorers in death overs (overs 17–20) across captured MLC matches.

pp-wickets.title: Most powerplay wickets taken
pp-wickets.description: Top wicket-takers in the powerplay (overs 1–6) across captured MLC matches.

death-wickets.title: Most death-overs wickets taken
death-wickets.description: Top wicket-takers in death overs (overs 17–20) across captured MLC matches.

most-sixes-pp.title: Most powerplay sixes
most-sixes-pp.description: Most sixes hit in the powerplay (overs 1–6) across captured MLC matches.

most-sixes-death.title: Most death-overs sixes
most-sixes-death.description: Most sixes hit in death overs (overs 17–20) across captured MLC matches.

most-fours-pp.title: Most powerplay fours
most-fours-pp.description: Most fours hit in the powerplay (overs 1–6) across captured MLC matches.

most-fours-death.title: Most death-overs fours
most-fours-death.description: Most fours hit in death overs (overs 17–20) across captured MLC matches.
